details.test: Task 1: Member 3-day pass with cheapest Monday workshop ≤ $150
Task 2: Personal schedule with workshops and keynote sessions
Task 4: Nearby hotel under $220 with breakfast and start booking
Task 5: Sponsor package with logo and exhibit table
Task 6: Visit list for data analytics exhibitors with job opportunities
Task 7: RSVP to free evening event and paid event under $40
Task 8: Update profile dietary, track, and SMS preferences
Task 9: Add first post-3:00 PM airport shuttle to trip plan
